protocol.metric: best top-1 eval accuracy over training, mean +/- std over 3 seeds

notes: Baselines (Transformer, ConvMixer) are fully reproducible from baselines.py in this repo.
The ZetaPhi mixer is a proprietary linear-scaling attention replacement; only its scores are published here, not its code or mechanism.
All compared models share an identical training recipe, data pipeline, and (within ~2%) parameter budget for a fair comparison.
Reported number is the best eval accuracy over 100 epochs; with no LR schedule, final-epoch numbers are lower due to late overfitting and are not the headline metric.
Scope: this is a matched-budget CIFAR-100 comparison at ~0.45M params. It is not a claim of universal superiority across scales or tasks.
